name: knowledge-portal
description: Tree-structured knowledge portal over flat chat conversations

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n APP,INGEST,CLAUDE,CODEX -c blue,green,cyan,magenta "npm run app:watch" "npm run mtproto:loop" "npm run claude:sync:loop" "npm run codex:sync:loop"
scripts.prod:all: concurrently -n APP,INGEST -c blue,green "npm run app:start" "npm run mtproto:loop"
scripts.claude:sync:loop: while true; do node --env-file=${ENV_FILE:-.env} scripts/sync-claude-sessions.js; sleep 300; done
scripts.codex:sync:loop: while true; do node --env-file=${ENV_FILE:-.env} scripts/sync-codex-sessions.js; sleep 300; done
